since_last: 38% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.30%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.24% · BTC -0.01% · Gold +0.01% · Nasdaq100 -1.24%. 38% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.30%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.30%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.85%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NET is the standout at +9.18%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +9.18%, DDOG +5.06%, PLTR +4.70%, NOW +4.62%, ADBE +4.55%. Laggards: INTC -9.16%, TER -9.05%, AMBA -8.65%, MRVL -7.16%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.00% at $152.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.00% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
